news.paragraph: Twilio has seen significant investor attention recently, reclaiming its 20-day moving average and being recognized by Gartner as a leader in CPaaS for the fourth consecutive year. This positive momentum follows a substantial 30% surge in its share price over the past month, with analysts highlighting its status as a strong growth stock. The company's consistent leadership in its market segment suggests continued operational strength.

headlines.title: Is Twilio (TWLO) Still Attractive After A 30% Monthly Surge In The Share Price
